name: Chinese Quiche
recipeIngredient: 1 can (16 oz.) of Chinese vegetables, drained (1 cup)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Use a 9-inch pie pan with a non-stick finish or coat a regular pie pan with vegetable spray-on cooking oil.
3. Beat rice, soy sauce, ginger, and egg white together with a fork.
4. Pour the mixture into the pie pan and spread evenly using a rubber scraper on the bottom and halfway up the side of the pan (do not leave any holes).
5. In a separate bowl, beat eggs, egg yolk, milk, and salt thoroughly. Stir in the vegetables, chicken, and onions.
6. Carefully pour the mixture into the rice crust.
7. Bake until a knife inserted 1 inch from the edge comes out clean, about 30 to 40 minutes.
8. Immediately run a knife around the edge to loosen the crust. Let the quiche stand for 10 minutes before serving.
9. Cut into wedges and garnish with pimiento strips. Serve with Spicy Soy Sauce. (8 servings, 135 calories each.)
